title: Victorinox Swiss Classic Paring Knives. Twin Pack (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

VEGETABLE & PEELING KNIFE: The perfect universal knife for precise tasks such as removing pepper seeds. Their versatility makes them ideal as fruit and vegetable knives for fine cutting, peeling and coring.
PERFECT CUTTING: The straight blade with a centre point ensures precise and clean cuts without damaging the structure – for even cubes, fine sticks or delicate cuts.
EASY TO USE: The ergonomically shaped, lightweight handle ensures a perfect grip and precise control. Durable and dishwasher safe – for effortless cleaning.
DIMENSIONS: 189 mm long × 20 mm wide × 11 mm high. Weight: 20 g. Material: polypropylene (PP). Colour: black. Item number: 6.7603.B.

HIGHEST SWISS QUALITY: Victorinox stands for masterful engineering and innovative design. For 140 years, our experience has been incorporated into the development of high-quality, iconic knives, watches and luggage
description: Victorinox 67603B 2 x Paring Knife Pointed Tip 8cm Stainless Steel Blade
